20000002.Name: Pink Musk
20000002.Des: A pink decorative flower native to the Windblown Plains. Admired by the Asterians and recognized for its healing properties.

20000003.Name: Scallop
20000003.Des: This scallop thrives along the Seaside shore. Beneath the its sharp shell lies tender, succulent meat.

20000004.Name: Snowflake Parsley
20000004.Des: A blue medicinal flower found in Minsterhorn Village. First Appeared after the Andra Landing Battle.

20000005.Name: Whispering Orchid
20000005.Des: A rare purple flower that grows in the ocean depths. Known for its high medicinal value.

20000006.Name: Meadow Mushroom
20000006.Des: Found near the massive mechanical ruins at the site of the Andra Landing Battlefield. Looks like tiny umbrellas that protect insects from the weather.

20000007.Name: Grey-top Flax
20000007.Des: Linen nurtured by the Pale Azure Lake, breathing pristine vapors.

20000008.Name: Granny Pine
20000008.Des: A rare underwater fungus regarded as a treasure beneath the sea.

20000009.Name: Helmflower
20000009.Des: A yellow flower growing on floating isles. Its shape resembles a helm. Often called Rudder Anemone by sailors.

20000010.Name: Sweet Berry
20000010.Des: A sweet edible berry native to the Statue of the Hero. Considered a local specialty.

20000012.Name: Firefly
20000012.Des: Frequently seen along the waterside of the Statue of the Hero, this creature emits a gentle light that pierces the surrounding darkness.

20000013.Name: Tris Sea Fish
20000013.Des: A swift swimmer of the deep indigenous to southern waters, this agile fish challenges even the most skilled anglers.

20000014.Name: Pale Blue Fish
20000014.Des: A swift swimmer of the deep indigenous to Pale Azure Lake, this agile fish challenges even the most skilled anglers.

20000015.Name: Glowshroom
20000015.Des: Growing in damp, shadowy environments, it emits an eerie glow at night.

20000016.Name: Umu Fruit
20000016.Des: Grown upon floating islands, only the tempest-swept lands can cultivate its distinctive flavor.

20000017.Name: Azure Fruit
20000017.Des: Emerging from the ocean floor, this rare blue fruit is the seabed's most treasured offering.

20000018.Name: Wheat Field
20000018.Des: In the vast golden wheat field, the wind composes a shimmering melody as the full, heavy ears bow and sway.

20000019.Name: Asteria Cotton
20000019.Des: Found in the southern meadows of Minsterhorn. Produces high-quality cotton loved by the villagers.

20000021.Name: Thin Twig
20000021.Des: Above the Cliff Ruins lies a forest, its scattered clearings nestled beneath the sheltering canopy of trees.

20000022.Name: Wood Branch
20000022.Des: Isles of Pale Azure Lake, adrift beneath a cathedral of trees.

20000023.Name: Branch Cluster
20000023.Des: Littoral shallows adrift in dappled sylvan shadows.

20000219.Name: Mustard
20000219.Des: A unique mustard-like plant from the highlands that grows near the Mustard Tavern. Both spicy and sweet, it's a common side dish.

20000220.Name: Southwind Pepper
20000220.Des: A variety of highland chili that grows in the residential area of the Bekmar Transport Station. Bright in color and intense in flavor, it becomes even more aromatic when sun-dried.

20000221.Name: Bitter Orange
20000221.Des: Growing around Lallipar, this fragrant highland fruit is surprisingly bitter, a taste that often leaves outsiders perplexed...

20000222.Name: Rainbean
20000222.Des: A unique bean growing in the eastern Fallen River of the highlands, with a soft texture and a fresh aroma that blends notes of grass and nuts.

20000223.Name: Saffron
20000223.Des: The plant grows in Lallipar and blooms quietly in the thin highland air. Its filaments can be used in medicine or cooking and carry a gentle yet sharp, spicy aroma.

20000224.Name: Rockthistle
20000224.Des: A hardy flower that grows in rock crevices of Sislesa Mine. It seems to have some as-yet-unknown purpose...

20000241.Name: Alpine Flax
20000241.Des: A common plant of Bahamar that provides materials for Weaving.

20000242.Name: Alpine Cotton
20000242.Des: A common plant of Bahamar that provides materials for Weaving.

20000243.Name: Osteo Fir
20000243.Des: A common plant of Bahamar that provides materials for Artisanry.

20000244.Name: Windchime Birch
20000244.Des: A common plant of Bahamar that provides materials for Artisanry.

20000101.Name: Baru Ore
20000101.Des: Low-grade Baru ore is commonly found within the Towering Ruin. While focused on gathering, you may harvest Baru Ore, which is used to craft Mystery Metals.

20000102.Name: Baru Rich Ore
20000102.Des: Intermediate-grade Baru ore is commonly found in the core module sector. While focused on gathering, you may harvest Baru Rich Ore, which is used to craft Mystery Metals.

20000103.Name: Baru Pure Ore
20000103.Des: Baru Rich Ore is commonly found along the Thunder Cliff Trail. While focused on gathering, you may harvest Baru pure ore, which is used to craft Mystery Metals.

20000104.Name: Azte Ore
20000104.Des: Low-grade Azte ore is commonly found near the Old Kanamia Tribe. While focused on gathering, you may harvest Azte Ore, which is used to craft Radiant Stone.

20000105.Name: Azte Rich Ore
20000105.Des: Intermediate-grade Azte ore is commonly found on the floating isle at the center of the canyon. While focused on gathering, you may harvest Azte Rich Ore, which is used to craft Radiant Stone.

20000106.Name: Azte Pure Ore
20000106.Des: Azte Rich Ore is commonly found on the north side of Rotgate Courtyard. While focused on gathering, you may harvest Azte Pure Ore, which is used to craft Radiant Stone.

20000107.Name: Luna Ore
20000107.Des: Low-grade Luna ore is commonly found near the Scout Lookout Post. While focused on gathering, you may harvest Luna Ore, which is used to craft Fine Forgestone.

20000108.Name: Luna Rich Ore
20000108.Des: Low-grade Luna ore is also commonly found around Windwhisper Dome. While focused on gathering, you may harvest Luna Rich Ore, which is used to craft Fine Forgestone.

20000109.Name: Luna Pure Ore
20000109.Des: Luna Rich Ore is commonly found on the northern edge of the forest. While focused on gathering, you may harvest Luna Pure Ore, which is used to craft Fine Forgestone.

20000111.Name: Stokes Rich Ore
20000111.Des: Intermediate-grade Stokes ore is commonly found along the Seachime Cliff Trail. While focused on gathering, you may harvest Stokes Rich Ore, which is used to craft Buri Mech Shard.

20000112.Name: Stokes Pure Ore
20000112.Des: Stokes Rich Ore is commonly found in the forest caves to the south. While focused on gathering, you may harvest Stokes Pure Ore, which is used to craft Buri Mech Shard.

20000233.Name: Runye Ore
20000233.Des:
An ore formed in Mine No. 1 of Sislesa Mine in Bahamar Highlands. Its once-smooth surface is now coarse and covered in winding patterns and pores.
Under the influence of the Xeno Engram, it has become an entirely different mineral from Baru Ore.

20000234.Name: Runye Rich Ore
20000234.Des:
An ore formed in the lower Fallen River on the Bahamar Highland and the east of Stray Starway. Its once-smooth surface is now coarse and covered in winding patterns and pores.
Under the influence of the Xeno Engram, it has become an entirely different mineral from Baru Ore.

20000235.Name: Bahamar Ore
20000235.Des:
An ore formed in the Sorting and Transfer Zone of Sislesa Mine in Bahamar Highlands. It has a soft, flaky texture, resembling a stack of ancient pages pressed together.
Under the influence of the Xeno Engram, it has become an entirely different mineral from Azt Ore.

20000236.Name: Bahamar Rich Ore
20000236.Des:
An ore formed in the Fallen River on the Bahamar Highlands and the northeast of Stray Starway. It has a soft, flaky texture, resembling a stack of ancient pages pressed together.
Under the influence of the Xeno Engram, it has become an entirely different mineral from Azt Ore.

20000237.Name: Feier Ore
20000237.Des:
An ore formed in the Sislesa Mine on the Bahamar Highlands - Abandoned Cavern. Its texture is so fluffy that particles fall away at the slightest touch.
Under the influence of the Xeno Engram, it has become an entirely different mineral from Luna Ore.

20000238.Name: Feier Rich Ore
20000238.Des:
An ore formed in the southern Fallen River on the Bahamar Highlands and the southwest of Stray Starway. Its texture is so fluffy that particles fall away at the slightest touch.
Under the influence of the Xeno Engram, it has become an entirely different mineral from Luna Ore.

20000239.Name: Meteorite Ore
20000239.Des:
An ore formed in the mine tunnels on the Bahamar Highlands. Hard and dense, its deep black surface seems to absorb all light.
Under the influence of the Xeno Engram, it has become an entirely different mineral from Stokes Ore.

20000240.Name: Meteorite Rich Ore
20000240.Des:
An ore formed in the Augurus Ruins on the Bahamar Highlands and the northwest of Stray Starway. Hard and dense, its deep black surface seems to absorb all light.
Under the influence of the Xeno Engram, it has become an entirely different mineral from Stokes Ore.

20000100.Name: Andra Enigmite
20000100.Des: Mysterious black stones, often scattered across polluted corridors, hint at hidden functionality.

20000201.Name: Raw Ore of Sapphire
20000201.Des: Commonly found along the northern shore of Pale Azure Lake, raw ore of Starlight Sapphire Lv.1 can be gathered when focused. Once refined, these crystals serve as gem inlays for gear, enhancing Haste.

20000202.Name: Rich Ore of Sapphire
20000202.Des: Commonly found along the plank road in Mistveil Gorge, raw ore of Starlight Sapphire Lv.2 can be gathered when focused. Once refined, these crystals serve as gem inlays for gear, enhancing Haste.

20000203.Name: Sapphire Cluster
20000203.Des: Commonly found along the western edge of the Glade Crevice, raw ore of Starlight Sapphire Lv.3 can be gathered when focused. Once refined, these crystals serve as gem inlays for gear, enhancing Haste.

20000204.Name: Raw Ore of Ruby
20000204.Des: Commonly found inside the bomb crater at Andra Landing Battlefield, raw ore of Starlight Ruby Lv.1 can be gathered when focused. Once refined, these crystals serve as gem inlays for gear, enhancing Crit.

20000205.Name: Rich Ore of Ruby
20000205.Des: Commonly found in supply module zones, raw ore of Starlight Ruby Lv.2 can be gathered when focused. Once refined, these crystals serve as gem inlays for gear, enhancing Crit.

20000206.Name: Ruby Cluster
20000206.Des: Commonly found on the western Crystal Slope, raw ore of Starlight Ruby Lv.3 can be gathered when focused. Once refined, these crystals serve as gem inlays for gear, enhancing Crit.

20000207.Name: Raw Ore of Topaz
20000207.Des: Commonly found around the giant vines near the Kanamia Tribe, raw ore of Starlight Diamond Lv.1 can be gathered when focused. Once refined, these crystals serve as gem inlays for gear, enhancing Luck.

20000208.Name: Rich Ore of Topaz
20000208.Des: Commonly found in stability control module zones, raw ore of Starlight Diamond Lv.2 can be gathered when focused. Once refined, these crystals serve as gem inlays forgear, enhancing Luck.

20000209.Name: Topaz Cluster
20000209.Des: Commonly found on the eastern Crystal Slope, raw ore of Starlight Diamond Lv.3 can be gathered when focused. Once refined, these crystals serve as gem inlays for gear, enhancing Luck .

20000210.Name: Raw Ore of Emerald
20000210.Des: Commonly found near the Statue of the Hero, raw ore of Starlight Emerald Lv.1 can be gathered when focused. Once refined, these crystals serve as gem inlays for gear, enhancing Mastery.

20000211.Name: Rich Ore of Emerald
20000211.Des: Commonly found on floating isles, raw ore of Starlight Emerald Lv.2 can be gathered when focused. Once refined, these crystals serve as gem inlays for gear, enhancing Mastery.

20000212.Name: Emerald Cluster
20000212.Des: Commonly found in western mine shafts, raw ore of Starlight Emerald Lv.3 can be gathered when focused. Once refined, these crystals serve as gem inlays for gear, enhancing Mastery.

20000213.Name: Limestone
20000213.Des: Commonly found near the Forbidden Zone of Kanamia, these weathered white stones rest in quiet stillness, with time etching mottled textures into the sedimentary rock layers.

20000214.Name: Slate
20000214.Des: Commonly seen around Canyon Camp, these weathered slab-like stones rest in quiet stillness, with time etching mottled textures into the sedimentary rock layers.

20000215.Name: Granite
20000215.Des: Born of molten lava, these rocks now lie in solemn stillness—their sharp edges catching the sunlight, pulsing with the ancient heartbeat of the mountains.

20000225.Name: Eclipse Raw Ore of Ruby
20000225.Des: A rare crystal commonly found in the northern Bahamar Highlands. Infused with Xeno Engram, its interior displays patterns that resemble cross-sections of spacetime itself.

20000226.Name: Eclipse Rich Ore of Ruby
20000226.Des: A rare crystal commonly found in the lower Fallen River of the Bahamar Highlands and the northeast of Moonshadow Wilds. Infused with Xeno Engram, its interior displays patterns that resemble cross-sections of spacetime itself.

20000245.Name: Eclipse Ruby Cluster
20000245.Des: A rare crystal native to the Sunken Corridor and Gloomy Depths. Infused with Xeno Engram, its interior displays patterns that resemble cross-sections of spacetime itself.

20000227.Name: Eclipse Raw Ore of Topaz
20000227.Des: A rare crystal commonly found in the northern Bahamar Highlands. Infused with Xeno Engram, its interior displays patterns that resemble cross-sections of spacetime itself.

20000228.Name: Eclipse Rich Ore of Topaz
20000228.Des: A rare crystal commonly found in the lower Fallen River of the Bahamar Highlands and the northeast of Moonshadow Wilds. Infused with Xeno Engram, its interior displays patterns that resemble cross-sections of spacetime itself.

20000246.Name: Eclipse Topaz Cluster
20000246.Des: A rare crystal native to the Sunken Corridor and Gloomy Depths. Infused with Xeno Engram, its interior displays patterns that resemble cross-sections of spacetime itself.

20000229.Name: Eclipse Raw Ore of Emerald
20000229.Des: A rare crystal commonly found around the boulder of the Fallen River in Bahamar Highlands. Infused with Xeno Engram, its interior displays patterns that resemble cross-sections of spacetime itself.

20000230.Name: Eclipse Rich Ore of Emerald
20000230.Des: A rare crystal commonly found at the bottom of the Fallen River in Bahamar Highlands and the northeast of Moonshadow Wilds. Infused with Xeno Engram, its interior displays patterns that resemble cross-sections of spacetime itself.

20000247.Name: Eclipse Emerald Cluster
20000247.Des: A rare crystal native to the Sunken Corridor and Gloomy Depths. Infused with Xeno Engram, its interior displays patterns that resemble cross-sections of spacetime itself.

20000231.Name: Eclipse Raw Ore of Sapphire
20000231.Des: A rare crystal commonly found in the lower Fallen River of the Bahamar Highlands. Infused with Xeno Engram, its interior displays patterns that resemble cross-sections of spacetime itself.

20000232.Name: Eclipse Rich Ore of Sapphire
20000232.Des: A rare crystal commonly found in the lower Fallen River of the Bahamar Highlands and the northeast of Moonshadow Wilds. Infused with Xeno Engram, its interior displays patterns that resemble cross-sections of spacetime itself.

20000248.Name: Eclipse Sapphire Cluster
20000248.Des: A rare crystal native to the Sunken Corridor and Gloomy Depths. Infused with Xeno Engram, its interior displays patterns that resemble cross-sections of spacetime itself.
